---
name: Feature Request
description: Propose a new feature for Business OS
title: "[FEAT] "
labels: ["feature", "needs-triage"]
assignees: []
---

## Problem

What founder problem does this solve? Reference `marketing/01_customer/CUSTOMER_PROBLEMS.md` if applicable.

## Solution

Describe the feature and how it helps the founder answer a marketing question more confidently.

## Principles Alignment

Which of our 8 principles does this support? Which might it challenge?

- [ ] Conversation First
- [ ] Local First
- [ ] Founder Control
- [ ] Context Before AI
- [ ] Cost First
- [ ] Zero Vendor Lock-in
- [ ] Compliance by Design
- [ ] Everything should feel simple

## Scope

- [ ] MVP (instagram, gmail, google-ads, website only)
- [ ] Post-MVP
- [ ] Out of scope for V1 (see COMPANY_CONTEXT.md §16)

## ADR Required?

Does this change architecture, data model, or set a precedent?

- [ ] Yes - will create ADR following templates/ADR_TEMPLATE.md
- [ ] No - routine implementation

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Founder can [specific action] without writing code
- [ ] Works offline / local-first
- [ ] Data stays on founder's machine
- [ ] No new recurring costs
- [ ] Tests pass (if applicable)

## Additional Context

Screenshots, mockups, research links, etc.
